# LLM Agents Ecosystem Handbook

> A practical operating manual for building, evaluating, securing, and shipping modern LLM agent systems. Modern agents are systems with identity, memory, skills, tools, MCP integrations, guardrails, observability, evals, and a provider strategy — this repo teaches the whole stack with templates, blueprints, runnable adapters, and curated examples.

## Start here

- [README.md](README.md): repository overview, modern agent stack, learning paths
- [agent_os/README.md](agent_os/README.md): the Agent OS concept — files, layers, conventions
- [llm_wiki/index.md](llm_wiki/index.md): file map + concept locations for LLM navigation
- [MIGRATION_AND_PROVIDER_EXPANSION_PLAN.md](MIGRATION_AND_PROVIDER_EXPANSION_PLAN.md): what was merged in 1.0.1 and where

## Concepts (Agent OS)

- [agent_os/agent_identity.md](agent_os/agent_identity.md): SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, USER.md
- [agent_os/memory_layer.md](agent_os/memory_layer.md): memory model
- [agent_os/skills_layer.md](agent_os/skills_layer.md): Skills + progressive disclosure
- [agent_os/mcp_layer.md](agent_os/mcp_layer.md): tools and MCP
- [agent_os/safety_layer.md](agent_os/safety_layer.md): guardrails, approvals, risk levels
- [agent_os/observability_layer.md](agent_os/observability_layer.md): traces, metrics, evals

## Providers (24+)

- [providers/README.md](providers/README.md): families, quick start
- [providers/provider_matrix.md](providers/provider_matrix.md): capability comparison
- [providers/provider_abstraction.md](providers/provider_abstraction.md): LLMProvider interface
- [providers/router_patterns.md](providers/router_patterns.md): task-class routing + fallback
- [providers/local_models.md](providers/local_models.md): Ollama / LM Studio / vLLM / llama.cpp
- [providers/env_vars.md](providers/env_vars.md): every env var
- [providers/cost_latency_matrix.md](providers/cost_latency_matrix.md), [providers/model_selection_guide.md](providers/model_selection_guide.md)
- [providers/examples/](providers/examples/): per-provider runnable adapters + router_example.py
- Code: [utilities/llm_provider.py](utilities/llm_provider.py), [utilities/provider_config.py](utilities/provider_config.py), [utilities/provider_router.py](utilities/provider_router.py), [utilities/provider_errors.py](utilities/provider_errors.py)

- [observability/](observability/): tracing, spans, logging, cost, latency, failure analysis, dashboards
